output.title: Landlord Withholding Your Security Deposit? 7 Viral Reel Hooks to Fight Back
output.meta_description: Landlord withholding your security deposit? Use these 7 viral hooks to fight back and demand your money back in 60 seconds at Deposits-Back.com.
content_outline: Hook 1: The 'Ghosted' Opener — 'My landlord won't give me my deposit back...'
Hook 2: The 'Deduction Detective' — What can a landlord deduct from your security deposit (and what they can't)
Hook 3: The 'Deadline' Shock — State laws on how long before a landlord has to return your deposit
Hook 4: The 'Wrongful Withholding' Reveal — Can a landlord keep your security deposit for no reason?
Hook 5: The 'Demand Letter' Power Move — How to write a security deposit dispute letter that scares landlords
Hook 6: The 'Tenant Rights' Flex — 'Is my landlord required to return my deposit? Yes. Here's proof.'
Hook 7: The 60-Second CTA — How to generate a legal demand letter for $19.99 with no sign-up
key_points: Landlords cannot legally withhold security deposits for normal wear and tear or without an itemized deduction list
State deadlines vary, but most require deposit returns within 14–45 days; missing the deadline can forfeit their right to keep any of it
A formal written demand letter is often legally required before small claims court and triggers faster payment
Deposits-Back.com generates a state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for a flat $19.99 with no sign-up and no subscription
output.cta: Stop letting your landlord keep what's yours. Create your state-specific security deposit demand letter in 60 seconds for $19.99 at Deposits-Back.com—no sign-up, no subscription, just results.
output.target_audience: Frustrated US tenants whose landlords are wrongfully withholding, delaying, or deducting from their security deposit and need fast, affordable legal pressure to get their money back
